title: Standard Source
description: A registered external standard in the platform standards source registry (01-sources/registry/). A standard must be registered here before any platform control may cite it as provenance.

id.description: Stable identifier. Format: SRC-{ISSUER}-{STANDARD}-{VERSION_SLUG}. Never changes once assigned.

name.description: Full canonical name of the standard as published by its issuing body.

version.description: Version string exactly as published by the issuing body.

publisher.description: Organisation that publishes and maintains this standard.

source_url.description: Canonical URL for this specific version of the standard.

retrieved_at.description: Date this version was retrieved and reviewed before registration (ISO 8601).

registered_date.description: Date this entry was added to the registry (ISO 8601).

registered_by.description: Identity of the person or role that registered this entry.

role.description: normative: controls derived directly from requirements. adopted: practices applied as-is. adapted: intent adopted but tailored; adaptation documented in notes. informative: context only. deferred: registered but not yet active.

applies_to.description: Domain codes or taxonomy values indicating the platform scope this standard addresses.

status.description: active: in use; deprecated: not recommended but existing citations valid; superseded: replaced, superseded_by must be set.

superseded_by.description: Required when status is superseded. The source ID of the replacing entry.

notes.description: Platform-level notes on scope, applicability, or adaptation rationale. Required when role is adapted.
